workflows.referenced_states: IdentifyContextProcess | PersonSearchStateWAH | TriagePatientWAH | ConfirmationWAH | ViewLocksProcess | SelectHospitalProcess | PersonSearchWAH
workflows.reconstructed_steps: Identify Context -> Person Search State -> Triage Patient -> View Locks -> Select Hospital -> Person Search
Identify Context -> Triage Patient List -> Attend Patient -> Select Hospital

rules.description: An attempt was made to update a Triaged Patient that has not been assigned a HospitalId.
An attempt was made to update a Triaged Patient that has not yet been saved for the first time.
An attempt was made to save/update a Triaged Patient that has missing mandatory fields.
Admission Date not captured

Gets raised when no treating doctor supplied
Gets raised when no treating doctor supplied
Raised when Treating and Referring Practitioner Same
Gets raised when a Unverified auth number provided by an admissions clerk is already used in the system
Raised when the supplied SA ID is invalid.
Gets raised when the user tries to create a duplicate on the guarantor screen
Gets raised when the user tries to create a duplicate patient.
The admission date cannot be before the retrospective window period
Gets raised when the user has not selected a departure type
Gets raised when the validate service calls fails
Gets raised when the departure date is in the future
Gets raised when the departure date is before the admission date
Gets raised when the departure date is before midnight today.
Gets raised when the departure date is before within the retrospective window departure date
Gets raised when the admission date is after the departure date

validations.summary: /// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///

validations.conditions: Patient != null | Patient.PostalAddress != null | Patient.ResidentialAddress != null

validations.summary: /// Check that everything to do with completing the objective as defined by /// PatientDetailedInformation is fulfilled. The PersonDetailsEvaluator will /// check for the absence of addresses, whilst the AddressEvaluator /// will check the actual contents of the address. ///
/// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///

validations.conditions: Patient != null | Patient.PostalAddress != null | Patient.ResidentialAddress != null

validations.summary: /// Check that everything to do with completing the objective as defined by /// PatientDetailedInformation is fulfilled. The PersonDetailsEvaluator will /// check for the absence of addresses, whilst the AddressEvaluator /// will check the actual contents of the address. ///
/// Validates the unverified auth does not exist. ///
validations.conditions: context != null && context.TriageAdmission!= null && context.TriageAdmission.MedicalAidDetails != null && context.TriageAdmission.MedicalAidDetails.MemberSchemeId != null && (context.TriageAdmission.MedicalAidDetails as IAuthorisationPlaceholderDetails | !string.IsNullOrEmpty(authorisationNumber | context.AuthorisationStatus == null || (context.AuthorisationStatus.AuthorisationStatusType == AuthorisationStatusTypeCodeData.UnverifiedManualAuthorisation && context.AuthorisationStatus.AuthorisationNumber != authorisationNumber | negotiation != null

validations.summary: /// Validates if supplied SA ID is valid. ///

validations.conditions: context != null && context.Patient != null && HasMatches(context.Patient | context.Patient.IsNew && context.Patient.HasSufficientIdentity(new IdentifierTypeCodeData[] { IdentifierTypeCodeData.IdNumber } | !context.Patient.IsNew // if an existing 'soft' duplicate (same name, surname, dob | id.IsNewObject

context != null && context.TriageAdmission != null && context.TriageAdmission.GuarantorType == GuarantorTypeCodeData.OtherPerson && context.Guarantor != null && HasMatches(context.Guarantor | context.Guarantor.IsNew
